sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Globant SA Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Globant SA on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 15, 2024, and August 14, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Globant's touted Latin American expansion strategy was unsuccessful, leading to declining demand, client defections, and employee turmoil. These issues were fully disclosed on August 14, 2025, resulting in a 2% headcount reduction and a significant drop in stock price.

feed.title: Sanctuary Advisors LLC Increases Stock Position in Griffon Corporation $GFF
feed.summary: Sanctuary Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Griffon Corporation (NYSE:GFF) by 727.1% during Q4, now owning 91,341 shares worth approximately $6.73 million. This increase in institutional ownership comes amidst insider selling and mixed analyst views for Griffon, which recently beat its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. The company has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $107.67.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group, Inc. $WEC Shares Bought by Pictet Asset Management Holding SA

The article details WEC Energy Group's financial performance, recent dividend announcement, and analyst ratings, alongside insider selling activity from its executives.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Corp. Stock (US8085131050): Q1 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for April 30
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. Investors will be focusing on metrics such as core net new assets, daily average revenue trades (DARTs), net interest revenue, and pre-tax margin. The report will reflect how the brokerage giant performed during recent periods of market volatility and economic changes, with particular attention to client assets and trading activity.

feed.title: PG&E (PCG): A Reaffirmed Outlook Could Be Sending A Bigger Message
feed.summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) reaffirmed its full-year 2026 non-GAAP core earnings guidance of $1.64 to $1.66 per share, indicating confidence in its regulated growth plans and capital investment returns. This positive outlook is supported by a recent price target increase from Bank of America and PG&E's ongoing grid modernization and clean energy transition efforts. The company, which serves over 5.5 million accounts in California, aims for net-zero emissions by 2040 and is recognized for its profitability within the renewable energy sector.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 41,998 Shares of Jacobs Solutions Inc. $J
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Jacobs Solutions Inc. by 41,998 shares, now owning 11.57% of the company. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while company president Shannon Miller sold 1,440 shares. Analysts are divided on the stock, with 6 "Buy" and 6 "Hold" ratings, and the company recently beat EPS expectations but missed revenue targets for the last quarter.

feed.title: CMS Energy Stock (US12589P1012): Declares Quarterly Dividend of 52.25 Cents
feed.summary: CMS Energy Corp. (NYSE: CMS) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5225 per share, payable on May 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The ex-dividend date is May 14, 2026. This declaration continues the company's consistent dividend policy, reflecting its stable cash flow generation from its regulated utility operations focused on energy infrastructure in Michigan.

feed.title: CME Group Inc. Stock (US12572Q1058): Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.40 Per Share
feed.summary: CME Group Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.40 per share for its Class A and Class B-1 common stock. This dividend is payable on March 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 9, 2026, and represents a 5-cent increase from the previous quarter. The decision was made following the company's strong Q4 2025 results and reflects its commitment to returning capital to shareholders.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Increases Stock Holdings in Avery Dennison Corporation $AVY
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Avery Dennison Corporation, raising its holdings to 10,448,799 shares. The company recently reported strong Q1 earnings, beating estimates, but provided Q2 guidance slightly below consensus, which caused a minor stock dip. Avery Dennison is also investing in digital identification technologies to pursue higher-margin opportunities.

feed.title: Xcel Energy First Quarter 2026 Earnings Report
feed.summary: Xcel Energy reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with GAAP earnings per share of $0.89 and ongoing earnings per share of $0.91, up from $0.84 in 2025. The company reaffirmed its 2026 ongoing EPS guidance of $4.04 to $4.16, driven by electric infrastructure investments and sales growth despite warm weather. Xcel Energy highlighted a significant data center agreement with Google as a key development, emphasizing its commitment to grid modernization and sustainable energy.

feed.title: Anthony Cataldo Stole $3.2M From GT Biopharma to Fund His Beverly Hills Mansion
feed.summary: The SEC has filed a complaint against Anthony Joseph Cataldo, former CEO of GT Biopharma, alleging he misappropriated $3.2 million in investor funds, including nearly $2.6 million for a Beverly Hills mansion down payment. Cataldo settled with the SEC for a $30,000 civil penalty, but the SEC is also seeking a permanent bar from serving as an officer or director of any public company. This comes as Cataldo is pursuing a $17.1 million NYSE IPO for his new venture, EIR Biopharma, Inc., and highlights a history of questionable business practices in his career.

feed.title: John Deere Settles Right-to-Repair Lawsuit
feed.summary: John Deere has settled a significant right-to-repair lawsuit for $99 million. This judgment will require the company to provide wider access to its diagnostic tools and software, which has been a major point of contention for farmers and independent repair shops. The settlement marks a notable development in the ongoing battle over the right to repair agricultural machinery.

feed.title: After Earnings, Is Tesla Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar maintains its $400 fair value estimate for Tesla, rating the stock as fairly valued after its first-quarter earnings. Despite strong operating profits and free cash flow, shares fell due to management's increased 2026 capital expenditure guidance and negative free cash flow outlook for the remainder of the year. The company's heavy investment focuses on transitioning to autonomous vehicles and humanoid robots, which Morningstar views as a positive long-term strategy.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp. Stock (US2441991054): Shares Dip Amid Earnings Anticipation
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (Nasdaq: DECK) stock has traded lower on Nasdaq due to broader market caution ahead of its upcoming quarterly earnings release, scheduled for early May 2026. This dip reflects market dynamics, including geopolitical tensions and a focus on corporate results, with investors monitoring how Deckers navigates consumer spending patterns in a high-interest-rate environment. Despite risks, the company's strong brand portfolio like UGG and HOKA, and U.S.-centric operations, position it well in growth categories, though macroscopic and competitive risks warrant close monitoring.

Horton's performance offers key insights into the broader U.S. housing market.

feed.title: Europe trial enrollment jump leaves Greenwich finalizing 10-K figures
feed.summary: Greenwich LifeSciences (GLSI) announced its Form 10-K for fiscal 2025 is still under audit, with auditors expecting completion by the end of May, coinciding with the Q1 2026 Form 10-Q filing. The delay is primarily due to final adjustments needed for accounts payable related to the large global Phase III clinical trial, FLAMINGO-01, especially an unexpectedly high enrollment increase in Europe during 2024 and 2025. The company reiterated an unaudited cash balance of approximately $10.5 million as of March 31, 2026.

The report will

feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (US22822V1017) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026. The company's performance is closely watched due to its role in the U.S. wireless infrastructure market and its trading on Nasdaq under the ticker CCI.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) After A 40% Share Price Slide
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has seen its shares decline by 40% over the past year, prompting reassessment of its valuation. While an Excess Returns analysis suggests a 68.2% undervaluation with an intrinsic value of $145.36 per share, a Price vs. Earnings comparison indicates the stock is overvalued, trading at a P/E of 62.54x against a "Fair Ratio" of 19.75x. The article highlights that investors should consider both quantitative and qualitative factors when evaluating FIS.

feed.title: Gevo (GEVO) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Gevo (GEVO) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, May 7th, with analysts expecting a loss of ($0.02) per share and revenue of $44.6490 million. The company previously beat consensus estimates in its last quarterly report on March 5th, reporting ($0.02) per share against an expected ($0.03). Insider selling by a director and COO totaling over $337,000 has been noted, while institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Corp. Stock (US22160K1051): Q3 Earnings Beat Expectations on Strong Sales
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp. reported strong fiscal third-quarter results, with net sales reaching $62.24 billion, an 8.2% year-over-year increase, surpassing analyst expectations. This performance was driven by robust membership growth, strong comparable sales in the U.S., and significant e-commerce expansion, despite ongoing inflationary pressures. The company's Q3 2026 earnings highlight its resilient business model and ability to navigate economic headwinds.

feed.title: Has Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Fallen Too Far After A 40% One‑Year Slump?
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) has experienced a significant 40% decline in its share price over the past year, prompting questions about its current valuation. Despite the slump, Simply Wall St's analysis, including a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and Price to Sales (P/S) ratio, suggests the stock is currently undervalued. The DCF model indicates a 41.8% discount from its intrinsic value of $70.55 per share, while its P/S ratio of 2.43x is below industry and fair ratio averages.

feed.title: Air Products lifts outlook, citing Samsung fab win and NASA role
feed.summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD) reported strong fiscal 2026 Q2 results with GAAP EPS of $3.19 and adjusted EPS of $3.20, both significantly up year-over-year. The company raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance to $13.00–$13.25, citing solid first-half performance, new contracts with Samsung for a South Korea semiconductor fab, and support for NASA's Artemis II mission. Air Products also detailed strategies to enhance helium supply chain resilience and reiterated its fiscal year capital expenditure guidance of approximately $4.0 billion.

feed.title: KeyCorp inks acquisition of Clearwater
feed.summary: KeyCorp, owner of Key Bank, is set to acquire Clearwater Corporate Finance LLP, a U.K.-based investment advisory firm. This acquisition aims to expand KeyCorp's services into Western Europe, offering a combined platform for U.S. and European clients to access M&A markets. The deal is expected to close in the second half of 2026, pending regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Greenwich LifeSciences Provides Update Regarding Form 10-K Filing
feed.summary: Greenwich LifeSciences (Nasdaq: GLSI) provided an update on its Form 10-K filing for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, stating that auditors expect to complete their review by the end of May. The delay is attributed to adjustments related to accounts payable for its Phase III clinical trial, FLAMINGO-01, and increased patient enrollment in Europe. The company also reported an unaudited cash balance of approximately $10.5 million as of March 31, 2026, and shared preliminary positive recurrence rate data from the FLAMINGO-01 trial.

feed.title: The Cooper Companies Stock (US21664P1039): Q1 2026 Earnings Set for Release Today
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies (US21664P1039) is poised to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results today, April 30. Investors will be scrutinizing the performance of its contact lenses (CooperVision) and women's health (CooperSurgical) segments for insights into growth, margins, and supply chain resilience. The company operates globally, with a strong presence in the U.S., and is known for its research-driven product development and strategic acquisitions in specialty healthcare.

The dividend declaration is particularly relevant as the company addresses increasing power demands from AI data centers and electrification trends.

(NYSE:GWW) by 11.6% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 18,868 shares to hold a total of 180,990 shares valued at approximately $182.6 million. Analyst consensus maintains a "Hold" rating with a price target of $1,118.14.

feed.title: Turnaround for CGI's US Business Can Take Longer Than Expected
feed.summary: This article discusses CGI Inc.'s performance, noting that its strong exposure to government contracts leads to more stable spending patterns compared to private-sector customers. Despite experiencing slower growth during the pandemic IT boom, CGI later became one of the fastest-growing IT-services names as overall demand faded. The analyst, Luke Yang, suggests that the turnaround for CGI's US business might take longer than anticipated due to underperformance in the US segment.

feed.title: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Capex to Exceed $25B in 2026, Says Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reported that Tesla's capital expenditure is projected to surpass $25 billion in 2026, driven by investments in autonomy and physical AI. Despite supporting Tesla's long-term vision, the firm maintained an "Equal Weight" stance with a $415 price target, citing limited near-term stock gains due to slower monetization of projects like robotaxi and Optimus. Concurrently, Tesla plans to hire approximately 1,000 additional workers at its German Gigafactory by June to increase Model Y production by 20% starting in Q3, responding to rising vehicle demand.

feed.title: Cintas Corp. Stock (US1729081035): Q2 Earnings Release Scheduled for April 30
feed.summary: Cintas Corp. (CTAS) is scheduled to release its fiscal Q2 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, after market close. Investors will be watching for insights into revenue growth, profitability trends, and how the company's uniform rental and safety product segments performed amidst labor market tightness and economic conditions. The report is crucial for assessing Cintas's ability to maintain margins and achieve its mid-single-digit revenue growth guidance for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Stock (US1713401024): Q1 2026 Earnings Preview Ahead of April 30 Report
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (NYSE: CHD) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings after market close on April 30, 2026. Investors will be looking for updates on sales growth in key brands, commentary on volume and pricing trends, and reaffirmation or adjustment of the fiscal 2026 guidance, which projected organic sales growth of 2.5% to 3.5% and adjusted EPS of $3.45 to $3.52. The company, known for household and personal care products like Arm & Hammer, operates primarily in the U.S. and is considered a stable consumer staples investment.

feed.title: Medical Antibacterial Coating Maret Is Going to Boom | 3M Company • Surfacide LLC • Sciessent LLC

The study provides market percentage records and in-depth analysis for business leaders, investors, and strategists. Key players identified include 3M Company, Surfacide LLC, and Sciessent LLC, among others.

feed.title: Alphabet Posts Blowout Earnings as Stock Hits Record. Now What?
feed.summary: Alphabet announced blowout earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with EPS of $5.11 and revenue of $110 billion, driven primarily by its Google Cloud segment. The company's stock jumped 7% after hours, reaching new record highs. Despite heavy capital expenditures in AI, Alphabet's strong advertising core and aggressive investment strategy position it as a leader in the Big Tech earnings season.

feed.title: Chevron Corp. Stock (US1667641005): Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.71 Per Share
feed.summary: Chevron Corp. has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.71 per share, payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record by May 19, 2026. This represents a 4% increase from the previous quarter and marks the 37th consecutive annual dividend increase, showcasing the company's commitment to shareholder returns despite fluctuating oil markets. Chevron's strong balance sheet, focus on low-cost production, and significant U.S. operations make it a key income stock for investors, though it faces risks from oil price volatility and energy transition pressures.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Stock: Q1 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for April 30

This report will offer insights into its core services' revenue and outlook within the competitive CRO landscape, providing U.S. investors with direct exposure to the domestic biotech outsourcing market.

feed.title: Cencora Inc. Stock (US15135B1017): Q1 2026 Earnings Preview Ahead of Report

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Cuts Stock Holdings in Camden Property Trust $CPT
